nasb.text: So they will know that I am the Lord when I scatter them among the nations and spread them among the countries.

esv.text: And they shall know that I am the Lord, when I disperse them among the nations and scatter them among the countries.

cnv.text: 我使他們四散到列邦中，分散在各地的時候，他們就知道我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 当我把他们驱赶到各国，分散到列邦时，他们就知道我是耶和华。
